alerts.title: Infra flagged (monitoring): OpenClaw 2026.4.15 → 2026.4.21  (released 2026-04-22)
alerts.body:
I've reviewed Infra's analysis. My take: low strategic risk.
The changes are mostly memory/UI improvements — nothing that affects our core setup.
Recommendation: update at your next convenient moment, not urgently.
→ When you're ready: openclaw update (or however you installed it)
